ddls:
CREATE TABLE "computers" (
  "computer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each computer */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the computer was last updated in the system */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system of the computer */,
  "cpu_cycle_rate" REAL /* CPU cycle rate in GHz */,
  "cpu_num_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores */,
  "ram_size" INTEGER /* RAM size in GB */,
  "hard_drive_size" INTEGER /* Hard drive size in GB */,
  "gpu_description" TEXT /* Short description of the GPU */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the computer is situated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department that the computer belongs to */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the computer was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty of the computer expires */,
  "asset_tag" TEXT /* Asset tag number for inventory purposes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the computer (e.g., active, inactive, decommissioned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("computer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computers_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the department is situated */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent department (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, IT staff, department head) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "mobile_number" TEXT /* Mobile number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "computer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computer being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the computer */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the computer was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_computer_id FOREIGN KEY ("computer_id") REFERENCES computers ("computer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "computer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computer the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage percentage */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage percentage */,
  "network_usage" REAL /* Network usage metrics */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_computer_id FOREIGN KEY ("computer_id") REFERENCES computers ("computer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance entry */,
  "computer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computer being checked for compliance */,
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hardware standard */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance check was performed */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "compliance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the compliance check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_compliance_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("standard_id") REFERENCES hardware_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_compliance_computer_id FOREIGN KEY ("computer_id") REFERENCES computers ("computer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hardware_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hardware standard */,
  "min_cpu_cycle_rate" REAL /* Minimum CPU cycle rate in GHz */,
  "min_cpu_num_cores" INTEGER /* Minimum number of CPU cores */,
  "min_ram_size" INTEGER /* Minimum RAM size in GB */,
  "min_hard_drive_size" INTEGER /* Minimum hard drive size in GB */,
  "required_gpu" TEXT /* Required GPU specification */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the standard */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the standard */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "computer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computer that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., hardware upgrade, software update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_computer_id FOREIGN KEY ("computer_id") REFERENCES computers ("computer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computer_software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software entry */,
  "computer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computer the software is installed on */,
  "software_name" TEXT /* Name of the software */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the software was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computer_software_computer_id FOREIGN KEY ("computer_id") REFERENCES computers ("computer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computer_network_interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network interface entry */,
  "computer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computer the interface belongs to */,
  "interface_type" TEXT /* Type of network interface (e.g., Ethernet, Wi-Fi) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address assigned to the interface */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computer_network_interfaces_computer_id FOREIGN KEY ("computer_id") REFERENCES computers ("computer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "computer_storage_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage device entry */,
  "computer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the computer the device belongs to */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of storage device (e.g., hard drive, solid state drive) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the storage device in GB */,
  "free_space" INTEGER /* Free space available on the storage device in GB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_computer_storage_devices_computer_id FOREIGN KEY ("computer_id") REFERENCES computers ("computer_id")
)
